sessions.title: Opening Keynote: The Production Agent Era
sessions.description: Meridian's applied AI leadership opens the summit with the state of enterprise agentic AI: what's moved from demo to production in the last year, where retrieval and orchestration are heading, and the delivery patterns separating pilots that ship from pilots that stall.

sessions.title: Hybrid Retrieval in Practice: BM25, Vectors, and Fusion
sessions.description: A hands-on-adjacent breakdown of why pure vector search underperforms in enterprise settings and how lexical + dense fusion fixes it. Covers reciprocal rank fusion, reranking, and how to tune retrieval when you can't calibrate score scales across retrievers.

sessions.title: Function Calling That Doesn't Fall Over
sessions.description: Tool-use reliability in production: schema design, handling malformed calls, multi-step tool loops, and guardrails that keep an agent from taking the wrong action. Real failure modes from real deployments.

sessions.title: Workshop: Build a Grounded Support Agent
sessions.description: A guided three-hour lab where you build a retrieval-grounded agent with case creation and escalation routing from scratch. Bring a laptop. Lab machines and starter repo provided. Seats limited; reservation required.

sessions.title: Securing Retrieval Pipelines
sessions.description: Prompt injection through retrieved documents, data governance across a vector store, and access control when an agent can read anything in the index. A security engineer's guide to not getting owned by your own RAG system.

sessions.title: From Pilot to Production: A CTO's Field Notes
sessions.description: An enterprise CTO walks through three AI programs — one that scaled, one that stalled, one that was killed — and the organizational, not technical, reasons why. Change management, executive sponsorship, and measuring the right things.

sessions.title: Evaluation-First AI Delivery
sessions.description: Why 'it looks good in the demo' isn't a metric. Building gold datasets, offline eval harnesses, recall@k for retrieval, and regression gates so you know when a change made your agent worse before your customer does.

sessions.title: Cost and Latency at Scale
sessions.description: The unglamorous engineering behind serving retrieval and generation to millions of requests: caching strategies, embedding reuse, model routing, and the tradeoffs that keep an AI feature from bankrupting the P&L.

sessions.title: Delivery Patterns for Field Engineers
sessions.description: A principal field engineer on how to walk into an unfamiliar customer stack and ship. Discovery, de-risking with prototypes, managing scope, and the soft skills that make or break an enterprise AI engagement.

sessions.title: Workshop: Evaluation Harness Deep Dive
sessions.description: A hands-on Friday lab building an evaluation pipeline for a retrieval system: assembling a gold set, scoring recall and precision, and wiring a regression gate into CI. Laptop required, reservation required.

sessions.title: Closing Session: What We Learned This Week
sessions.description: Meridian leadership closes the summit with a synthesis of the week's themes, community highlights, and a look at what's next for the platform and the field.
